title: Cost Control Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger cost control foundations judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Cost Control Foundations is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Cost Control Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good cost control foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Cost Control Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
